claim_boundary: This sanitized summary records a single-operator check that the frozen SOFTWARE_DEV_D001 pytest gate reported the expected missing-field violation for execution_mode and validate-all remained green. It does not prove general software security, full test coverage, CI replacement or repository-wide quality.
checked_claim: Under frozen protocol SOFTWARE_DEV_D001, pytest test_evidence_card_requires_execution_mode passes and the validator reports missing required field: execution_mode for a card without execution_mode.
known_limitations: Checks one required-field regression only, not the entire validator surface.
Does not replace CI, code review or security audit.
